overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian armor exploring a torch-lit temple complex at night. The character walks through covered stone pathways, enters a temple interior adorned with hieroglyphic murals, and continues through the complex passing by NPC villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with fabric canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway with bow and sword visible on back

entered.detail: red fabric canopy stretched overhead between stone structures
tall stone wall with decorative railings on the right side
tall palm trees visible in the background against night sky
lit fire bowl on metal stand providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone walkway at night, illuminated by fire braziers. Red fabric canopies stretch overhead between walls, and palm trees are visible in the distance against the dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with decorative pottery

events.description: exits covered walkway into open courtyard with large decorative pots
approaches and enters the temple entrance with hieroglyphic decorations

agents.ego_description: walking toward temple entrance through open courtyard lined with large ceramic vessels

entered.detail: large black and gold patterned ceramic vessel on stone pedestal
stone doorway with steps leading into the temple structure

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open courtyard filled with large decorative pottery. The temple entrance looms ahead, and the character approaches the stone steps leading inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with hieroglyphic murals and offerings

events.description: enters the temple interior from the outdoor courtyard
exits the temple back to the outdoor area

agents.ego_description: walking into the temple and observing the interior space with ancient wall paintings and scattered offerings

entered.detail: stone wall with large Egyptian hieroglyphic murals and figures
decorated stone pillar with blue and gold bands
piles of fruit, baskets, and lit candles arranged on the floor
large circular stone bowl on the right side of the chamber

segments.scene_description: Inside the torch-lit temple, the character observes hieroglyphic murals covering the far wall. Offerings of fruit and lit candles are scattered across the marble floor between decorated stone columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor garden terrace with fabric canopies

events.description: exits temple interior back into outdoor garden area with stairs

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs and through garden terrace with hanging fabric decorations

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading down from temple entrance
low stone wall with decorative lattice work

segments.scene_description: The character exits the temple down stone stairs into a garden terrace. White fabric canopies hang between palm trees, and stone walls line the pathway as the character continues through the torch-lit complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance approach with burning braziers

events.description: begins ascending final staircase toward the temple doorway
encounters NPC villagers standing near the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs toward temple entrance passing by villagers in white robes

notable_agents.action: villager in white robe standing near the staircase
villager in white robe standing near the wall

entered.detail: large wooden doorway with stone columns and lit braziers on either side
white hanging fabric curtains framing the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase toward a temple doorway, passing villagers in white robes standing by burning braziers. White fabric curtains frame the entrance as the character approaches the columned porch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit Egyptian temple complex, transitioning from covered walkways into sacred interiors and back out into open garden terraces. It begins along a stone walkway under red fabric canopies, moving past fire braziers toward a dark blue night sky and distant palm trees. As the character emerges into an open courtyard filled with decorative pottery, the camera follows them up stone steps and into a temple interior where hieroglyphic murals and candle-lit offerings adorn the marble floors. The scene then shifts as the character exits down stairs into a garden terrace with white canopies and palm trees, before finally ascending a wide stone staircase past robed villagers and burning braziers toward a columned porch.
